issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy paths.
The documentation contains verbose explanatory sections that could be trimmed for brevity.
The instructions are specific to Python and Node.js SDKs, lacking guidance for other platforms.

scenarios.name: build-a2a-server-with-streaming-and-cancellation
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response A lacks the required AgentCard, A2AStarletteApplication, and executor implementation.

scenarios.name: a2a-client-streaming-response
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully meets the rubric, while Response B does not use the required A2AClient API.

scenarios.name: multi-agent-code-pipeline-orchestrator
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A is empty.
